chapter_title.en: Chapter on Prohibition of Shedding Blood and Taking Wealth Unlawfully, the Prohibition of Engaging in the Impermissible, and Repentance From Killing Whether Intentional or Accidental

text: "قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "لاَ يَغُرَّنَّكُمْ رَحْبُ اَلذِّرَاعَيْنِ بِالدَّمِ فَإِنَّ لَهُ عِنْدَ اَللَّهِ قَاتِلاً لاَ يَمُوتُ" قَالُوا يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ وَ مَا قَاتِلٌ لاَ يَمُوتُ قَالَ " اَلنَّارُ " ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5152 - Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Mansur Buzurj from Abu Hamzah Al-Thumali from Imam Ali ibn Al-Hussain (as), who said: 'The Messenger of Allah (swt) said:
"Do not be deceived by one who freely sheds blood, for indeed, he has a killer appointed for him by Allah (swt) who does not die."
They asked: "O' Messenger of Allah (swt), and what is the killer that does not die?"
Prophet (sw) said: "The Fire."
